LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. US BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DARRELL JAMES IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $6,627 PLUS COSTS PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff US Bank National Association's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. US Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Darrell James in the principal amount of $6,627 plus costs per the memorandum of costs procedure. Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; (302/HEK)
